description_long: This is a heavily armored combat tactical vehicle resembling a main battle tank, featuring a large, elongated cannon mounted on a rotating turret. The vehicle's exterior is covered in a green and brown camouflage pattern, with angular, sloped armor plating enveloping the hull and turret for enhanced protection. The tank rides on a set of wide, continuous tracks with visible road wheels, designed for traversing rough terrain and urban obstacles. The turret is centrally positioned and appears to have a hatch and periscopic sighting equipment. The front and sides of the vehicle are reinforced, and the overall build suggests a focus on durability and firepower. No visible military insignia or unit markings are present, and the vehicle lacks any visible secondary armaments or external storage.
description: A camouflaged, heavily armored tank with a large turret-mounted cannon and wide tracks, designed for urban combat. The exterior features sloped armor and a green-brown camouflage pattern.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the tank, the main cannon, and the arrangement of the road wheels and tracks.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the sloped frontal armor, the width of the tracks, and the central placement of the turret and cannon.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the turret, cannon, and track system.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the turret, the rear armor, and the track ends; no visible exhaust or rear hatches.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the central turret; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating on the hull and turret; no modular or reactive panels visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Woodland-style camouflage with irregular green, brown, and black patches in a disruptive pattern.
